title: helichrysum rhodellum
intro: Helichrysum rhodellum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used for its medicinal properties, Helichrysum rhodellum contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Helichrysum rhodellum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
